Things I've shipped

AI · Senior Living · SaaS

SkyChat AI for Senior Living

Designed an AI-powered chat experience for senior living operations at Skypoint Cloud AI enabling staff to surface resident insights, care gaps, and operational data through natural conversation.

HealthTech · AI Agent · EHR

Skypoint Lia Care Manager

EHR-agnostic AI agent that overlays any healthcare platform surfacing unified patient 360 snapshots, care gaps, and intelligent recommendations at the point of care.

HealthTech · AI Scribe · Documentation

Skypoint Scribe AI Documentation

Browser-based AI scribe agent that transcribes and structures clinical interviews across any EHR eliminating double-entry and freeing care staff from documentation fatigue.

B2B · Admin Dashboard · Retail

Admin Dashboard Retail Solutions

Designed a customisable admin dashboard for retail website management at Eugenie AI giving operators full control over layouts, data visualisation, and content at scale.

About Me

A designer who
thinks in systems

I'm Sumit Awinash, a Senior Product Designer based in Bangalore with 6+ years of experience delivering intuitive and scalable UX across AI, SaaS and B2B platforms.

I specialise in crafting data-informed, user-centric designs that drive business growth from early discovery and wireframes all the way to developer-ready assets and QA. I've shipped products at Skypoint Cloud AI and Fractal Analytics, working closely with PMs and engineers to align on goals and deliver value fast.

I hold a B.E. in Information Technology from Mumbai University, and have completed certifications in UX Design (Google), Graphic Design (CalArts) and Growth Strategy (GrowthX). When I'm not in Figma, I'm thinking about how AI can make complex systems feel effortless.
